sentences.text: Hello. Thank you for calling games investment trust owners and operators of investment real estate to reach our customer service team press one for Matthew Norris press two for Matt Bernstein press three for Daniel Miller press four for Heidi whitmire press five for Jeff Gaines press six and for a dial by name directory press seven to leave a general voicemail, please enter at least the first three letters of the person's last name for Q press seven for Z. Jeff, Gaines extension one five five to select this extension press one, please say your name after the tone press the pound key after you finished recording. Hi, this is Jeff Gaines, I'm away from my desk or on another line. Please leave a name.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Donald Gaines @ Gaines Investment Trust
